snippets.description: ApplyConversionWorkspace applies draft tree onto a specific destination database.
snippets.title: datamigration ApplyConversionWorkspace Sample

snippets.description: CancelOperation is a utility method from google.longrunning.Operations.
snippets.title: datamigration CancelOperation Sample

snippets.description: CommitConversionWorkspace marks all the data in the conversion workspace as committed.
snippets.title: datamigration CommitConversionWorkspace Sample

snippets.description: ConvertConversionWorkspace creates a draft tree schema for the destination database.
snippets.title: datamigration ConvertConversionWorkspace Sample

snippets.description: CreateConnectionProfile creates a new connection profile in a given project and location.
snippets.title: datamigration CreateConnectionProfile Sample

snippets.description: CreateConversionWorkspace creates a new conversion workspace in a given project and location.
snippets.title: datamigration CreateConversionWorkspace Sample

snippets.description: CreateMappingRule creates a new mapping rule for a given conversion workspace.
snippets.title: datamigration CreateMappingRule Sample

snippets.description: CreateMigrationJob creates a new migration job in a given project and location.
snippets.title: datamigration CreateMigrationJob Sample

snippets.description: CreatePrivateConnection creates a new private connection in a given project and location.
snippets.title: datamigration CreatePrivateConnection Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteConnectionProfile deletes a single Database Migration Service connection profile.
A connection profile can only be deleted if it is not in use by any
active migration jobs.
snippets.title: datamigration DeleteConnectionProfile Sample

snippets.description: DeleteConversionWorkspace deletes a single conversion workspace.
snippets.title: datamigration DeleteConversionWorkspace Sample

snippets.description: DeleteMappingRule deletes a single mapping rule.
snippets.title: datamigration DeleteMappingRule Sample

snippets.description: DeleteMigrationJob deletes a single migration job.
snippets.title: datamigration DeleteMigrationJob Sample

snippets.description: DeleteOperation is a utility method from google.longrunning.Operations.
snippets.title: datamigration DeleteOperation Sample

snippets.description: DeletePrivateConnection deletes a single Database Migration Service private connection.
snippets.title: datamigration DeletePrivateConnection Sample

snippets.description:
DescribeConversionWorkspaceRevisions retrieves a list of committed revisions of a specific conversion
workspace.
snippets.title: datamigration DescribeConversionWorkspaceRevisions Sample

snippets.description:
DescribeDatabaseEntities describes the database entities tree for a specific conversion workspace
and a specific tree type.

Database entities are not resources like conversion workspaces or mapping
rules, and they can't be created, updated or deleted. Instead, they are
simple data objects describing the structure of the client database.
snippets.title: datamigration DescribeDatabaseEntities Sample

snippets.description:
FetchStaticIps fetches a set of static IP addresses that need to be allowlisted by the
customer when using the static-IP connectivity method.
snippets.title: datamigration FetchStaticIps Sample

snippets.description:
GenerateSshScript generate a SSH configuration script to configure the reverse SSH
connectivity.
snippets.title: datamigration GenerateSshScript Sample

snippets.description:
GenerateTcpProxyScript generate a TCP Proxy configuration script to configure a cloud-hosted VM
running a TCP Proxy.
snippets.title: datamigration GenerateTcpProxyScript Sample

snippets.description: GetConnectionProfile gets details of a single connection profile.
snippets.title: datamigration GetConnectionProfile Sample

snippets.description: GetConversionWorkspace gets details of a single conversion workspace.
snippets.title: datamigration GetConversionWorkspace Sample

snippets.description:
GetIamPolicy gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy
if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.
snippets.title: datamigration GetIamPolicy Sample

snippets.description: GetLocation gets information about a location.
snippets.title: datamigration GetLocation Sample

snippets.description: GetMappingRule gets the details of a mapping rule.
snippets.title: datamigration GetMappingRule Sample

snippets.description: GetMigrationJob gets details of a single migration job.
snippets.title: datamigration GetMigrationJob Sample

snippets.description: GetOperation is a utility method from google.longrunning.Operations.
snippets.title: datamigration GetOperation Sample

snippets.description: GetPrivateConnection gets details of a single private connection.
snippets.title: datamigration GetPrivateConnection Sample

snippets.description:
ImportMappingRules imports the mapping rules for a given conversion workspace.
Supports various formats of external rules files.
snippets.title: datamigration ImportMappingRules Sample

snippets.description:
ListConnectionProfiles retrieves a list of all connection profiles in a given project and
location.
snippets.title: datamigration ListConnectionProfiles Sample

snippets.description: ListConversionWorkspaces lists conversion workspaces in a given project and location.
snippets.title: datamigration ListConversionWorkspaces Sample

snippets.description: ListLocations lists information about the supported locations for this service.
snippets.title: datamigration ListLocations Sample

snippets.description: ListMappingRules lists the mapping rules for a specific conversion workspace.
snippets.title: datamigration ListMappingRules Sample

snippets.description: ListMigrationJobs lists migration jobs in a given project and location.
snippets.title: datamigration ListMigrationJobs Sample

snippets.description: ListOperations is a utility method from google.longrunning.Operations.
snippets.title: datamigration ListOperations Sample

snippets.description: ListPrivateConnections retrieves a list of private connections in a given project and location.
snippets.title: datamigration ListPrivateConnections Sample

snippets.description:
PromoteMigrationJob promote a migration job, stopping replication to the destination and
promoting the destination to be a standalone database.
snippets.title: datamigration PromoteMigrationJob Sample

snippets.description:
RestartMigrationJob restart a stopped or failed migration job, resetting the destination
instance to its original state and starting the migration process from
scratch.
snippets.title: datamigration RestartMigrationJob Sample

snippets.description:
ResumeMigrationJob resume a migration job that is currently stopped and is resumable (was
stopped during CDC phase).
snippets.title: datamigration ResumeMigrationJob Sample

snippets.description: RollbackConversionWorkspace rolls back a conversion workspace to the last committed snapshot.
snippets.title: datamigration RollbackConversionWorkspace Sample

snippets.description:
SearchBackgroundJobs searches/lists the background jobs for a specific
conversion workspace.

The background jobs are not resources like conversion workspaces or
mapping rules, and they can't be created, updated or deleted.
Instead, they are a way to expose the data plane jobs log.
snippets.title: datamigration SearchBackgroundJobs Sample

snippets.description:
SeedConversionWorkspace imports a snapshot of the source database into the
conversion workspace.
snippets.title: datamigration SeedConversionWorkspace Sample

snippets.description:
SetIamPolicy sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces
any existing policy.

Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED`
errors.
snippets.title: datamigration SetIamPolicy Sample

snippets.description: StartMigrationJob start an already created migration job.
snippets.title: datamigration StartMigrationJob Sample

snippets.description: StopMigrationJob stops a running migration job.
snippets.title: datamigration StopMigrationJob Sample

snippets.description:
TestIamPermissions returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the
resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of
permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error.

Note: This operation is designed to be used for building
permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization
checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.
snippets.title: datamigration TestIamPermissions Sample

snippets.description: UpdateConnectionProfile update the configuration of a single connection profile.
snippets.title: datamigration UpdateConnectionProfile Sample

snippets.description: UpdateConversionWorkspace updates the parameters of a single conversion workspace.
snippets.title: datamigration UpdateConversionWorkspace Sample

snippets.description: UpdateMigrationJob updates the parameters of a single migration job.
snippets.title: datamigration UpdateMigrationJob Sample

snippets.description:
VerifyMigrationJob verify a migration job, making sure the destination can reach the source
and that all configuration and prerequisites are met.
snippets.title: datamigration VerifyMigrationJob Sample
